ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "loan_amnt" REAL /* Loan amount requested */,
  "annual_inc" REAL /* Annual income of the borrower */,
  "dti" REAL /* Debt-to-income ratio */,
  "fico_range_low" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the borrower's FICO score range */,
  "fico_range_high" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the borrower's FICO score range */,
  "int_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "installment" REAL /* Monthly installment amount */,
  "sub_grade" TEXT /* Sub-grade of the loan */,
  "emp_length" TEXT /* Length of employment */,
  "home_ownership" TEXT /* Home ownership status */,
  "open_acc" INTEGER /* Number of open accounts */,
  "total_acc" INTEGER /* Total number of accounts */,
  "revol_bal" INTEGER /* Revolving balance */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the loan application */,
  "delinq_2yrs" INTEGER /* Number of delinquencies in the past 2 years */,
  "mths_since_last_delinq" INTEGER /* Months since the last delinquency */,
  "acc_now_delinq" INTEGER /* Number of accounts currently delinquent */,
  "pub_rec" INTEGER /* Number of derogatory public records */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Current loan status (e.g., Fully Paid, Current, Default) */,
  "loan_status_bin" INTEGER /* Binary loan status (1 for current, 0 for default) */,
  "months_cr_line" INTEGER /* Length of credit history in months */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term of the loan (36 or 60 months) */,
  "initial_list_status" TEXT /* Initial list status of the loan */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the loan */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borrower */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was approved */,
  "disbursed_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was disbursed */,
  "repayment_plan" TEXT /* Details of the repayment plan */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment */,
  "next_payment_due_date" TEXT /* Date the next payment is due */,
  "total_paid" REAL /* Total amount paid by the borrower */,
  "outstanding_balance" REAL /* Outstanding balance of the loan */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Amount of late fees charged */,
  "late_payment_count" INTEGER /* Number of late payments */,
  "default_date" TEXT /* Date the loan defaulted (if applicable) */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was closed (if applicable) */,
  "underwriter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the underwriter who approved the loan */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer who handled the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_purpose FOREIGN KEY ("purpose") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_home_ownership FOREIGN KEY ("home_ownership") REFERENCES home_ownership ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_underwriter_id FOREIGN KEY ("underwriter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_status FOREIGN KEY ("loan_status") REFERENCES loan_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_verification_status FOREIGN KEY ("verification_status") REFERENCES verification_status ("verification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowers" (
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrower */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the borrower */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the borrower */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the borrower */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the borrower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the borrower */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the borrower */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the borrower */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the borrower */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the borrower */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (SSN) of the borrower */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the borrower */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the borrower */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the borrower */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the borrower */,
  "monthly_income" REAL /* Monthly income of the borrower */,
  "total_debt" REAL /* Total outstanding debt of the borrower */,
  "credit_history_length" INTEGER /* Length of the borrower's credit history in years */,
  "credit_utilization_rate" REAL /* Credit utilization rate of the borrower */,
  "income_sources" TEXT /* Additional sources of income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan status (e.g., Fully Paid, Current, Default) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan status */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* A code representing the loan status (for internal use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan purpose (e.g., debt_consolidation, small_business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verification_status" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification status */,
  "verification_name" TEXT /* Name of the verification status (e.g., Not Verified, Source Verified) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the verification status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home ownership status */,
  "ownership_name" TEXT /* Name of the home ownership status (e.g., MORTGAGE, RENT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the home ownership status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan status */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the status change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the status change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_history_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES loan_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, underwriter, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the loan */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the loan */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the loan (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., application, agreement) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_type_code" TEXT /* Code representing the type of document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_documents_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
